abort.configure_via_addon: Configure the EspToolkit add-on (Settings → Add-ons → EspToolkit → Configuration): set the API token and ensure the add-on is running. The integration will be set up automatically.

init.title: Mac SDL simulator (optional)
init.description: Shared secret for the Mac agent that connects outbound to Home Assistant (not the add-on API token). Generate a long random string (e.g. openssl rand -hex 32), paste it here, and use the same value in ha_agent_client.py --token-file on your Mac. Then use Mac sim in the Designer (next to Simulate) while a device project is open.
